summary: Comprehensive testing of GLID Procurement Lead Manager - Post-Deal Lifecycle features completed successfully. All 26 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing shows all post-deal features working correctly including PostDealTabs, Invoice/Payment/Shipment/Delivery/Review tabs, ComplaintPanel, and pre-deal RFQ flows.
seed_data_creation: Used POST /api/reset to reset database to seed state. DEAL_WON RFQ (Ready-Mix Concrete, buyer GLID 3, seller GLID 3.1) used for testing full lifecycle.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All post-deal lifecycle APIs tested and working: Proforma Invoice (send/accept/reject), Payments (record/confirm/reject), Shipments (add/list), Delivery (record/list), Complaints (raise/respond/resolve/escalate), Reviews (submit/respond), Trust Score, File Upload. Auto stage progression works correctly. Complaint blocking stage progression verified. Frontend PostDealTabs, ComplaintPanel, FileUpload components all integrated and working.

backend_apis: POST /api/rfqs/{rfq_id}/proforma/reject - buyer rejects proforma, stage goes to NEGOTIATION ✅
POST /api/rfqs/{rfq_id}/review - buyer submits review, order closes ✅
frontend_features: PostDealTabs component renders for DEAL_WON stage RFQs ✅
Seller can fill and send proforma invoice form ✅
Buyer can accept proforma (tested Accept button) ✅
Buyer can record payment with amount, method, reference, milestone ✅
Complaint panel allows raising complaints with category and description ✅
Fulfillment progress bar shows correct percentage ✅
Stage flow shows post-deal stages when in post-deal phase ✅
File attach button works in message area ✅
Pre-deal RFQ flow still works (buyer dashboard, RFQ actions) ✅
Review tab has star rating component and submit button ✅
Invoice tab shows proforma details with Accept/Reject buttons ✅
Payment tab shows form and payment history ✅

test_credentials: No auth required. URL params: ?view=buyer&glid=3 for buyer, ?view=seller&glid=3.1 for seller
known_working_flows: Seller sends proforma → Stage changes to PROFORMA_SENT
Buyer accepts proforma → Stage auto-progresses to PAYMENT_PENDING
Buyer records payment → Shows in Payment History as Pending
Complaint raised → Shows blocking message for stage progression
Pre-deal actions (Counter Offer, Accept Quote, Reject Quote, Schedule Meeting) available in pre-deal stages
